parameters.query: INSERT INTO tv_signals (ticker, action, price, strategy, raw_payload, received_at) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5::jsonb,$6);

INSERT INTO trades (symbol, direction, entry_price, stop_loss, take_profit, size, setup_reason, status) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,'open') RETURNING id, symbol, direction, entry_price, stop_loss, take_profit;

UPDATE trades SET
  exit_price = $1,
  status = 'closed',
  closed_at = NOW(),
  pnl_usd = CASE
    WHEN direction = 'long' THEN ($1 - entry_price) * COALESCE(size, 1)
    ELSE (entry_price - $1) * COALESCE(size, 1)
  END,
  pnl_r = CASE
    WHEN stop_loss IS NOT NULL AND entry_price != stop_loss THEN
      CASE WHEN direction = 'long' THEN ($1 - entry_price) / ABS(entry_price - stop_loss)
           ELSE (entry_price - $1) / ABS(entry_price - stop_loss) END
    END
WHERE symbol = $2 AND status = 'open'
  AND id = (SELECT id FROM trades WHERE symbol = $2 AND status = 'open' ORDER BY opened_at DESC LIMIT 1)
RETURNING id, symbol, direction, entry_price, exit_price, pnl_usd, pnl_r;

parameters.text:
={{ '\u{1F4E1} Auto-Trade Opened

' + ($json.direction === 'long' ? '\u{1F7E2} LONG' : '\u{1F534} SHORT') + ' ' + $json.symbol + '
\u{1F4B0} Entry: $' + $json.entry_price + ($json.stop_loss ? '
\u{1F6D1} SL: $' + $json.stop_loss : '') + ($json.take_profit ? '
\u{1F3AF} TP: $' + $json.take_profit : '') + '
\u{1F194} Trade #' + $json.id }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO events (type, source, instrument, payload)
VALUES ('technical', 'wf4-tv', '{{ $json.ticker }}',
        jsonb_build_object(
            'ticker',     '{{ $json.ticker }}',
            'action',     '{{ $json.action }}',
            'direction',  {{ $json.direction === null ? 'NULL' : "'" + $json.direction + "'" }},
            'price',      {{ $json.price || 'NULL' }},
            'strategy',   '{{ ($json.strategy || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
            'stop_loss',  {{ $json.stop_loss === null ? 'NULL' : $json.stop_loss }},
            'take_profit', {{ $json.take_profit === null ? 'NULL' : $json.take_profit }},
            'received_at', '{{ $json.received_at }}'
        ))
RETURNING id;
INSERT INTO tv_signals (ticker, action, price, strategy, raw_payload, received_at) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5::jsonb,$6);

INSERT INTO trades (symbol, direction, entry_price, stop_loss, take_profit, size, setup_reason, status) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,'open') RETURNING id, symbol, direction, entry_price, stop_loss, take_profit;

UPDATE trades SET
  exit_price = $1,
  status = 'closed',
  closed_at = NOW(),
  pnl_usd = CASE
    WHEN direction = 'long' THEN ($1 - entry_price) * COALESCE(size, 1)
    ELSE (entry_price - $1) * COALESCE(size, 1)
  END,
  pnl_r = CASE
    WHEN stop_loss IS NOT NULL AND entry_price != stop_loss THEN
      CASE WHEN direction = 'long' THEN ($1 - entry_price) / ABS(entry_price - stop_loss)
           ELSE (entry_price - $1) / ABS(entry_price - stop_loss) END
    END
WHERE symbol = $2 AND status = 'open'
  AND id = (SELECT id FROM trades WHERE symbol = $2 AND status = 'open' ORDER BY opened_at DESC LIMIT 1)
RETURNING id, symbol, direction, entry_price, exit_price, pnl_usd, pnl_r;
